text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Mayano said I'm still a stupid kid 'cause 
I don't know anything about love!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But that's not true! I know a thing 
or two about it, I swear!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I mean, your chest gets all tight and your 
heart goes crazy, right? That's just like what 
happens when I watch a super amazing race!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey! What're you laughing at?! 
If I'm wrong, just tell me!
